response.objective_caption: An abstract monochrome image showing curved concentric bands and soft circular forms rendered in gradients of gray, framed with a wide white border
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract monochrome image showing curved concentric bands and soft circular forms rendered in gradients of gray, where intentional blur dissolves all edges into hazy indistinction and surfaces lack any fine texture or detail, creating a muted, washed-out appearance with tonal flatness rather than crisp photographic definition, framed with a wide white border
